data.title: Dow falls after weak jobs report; Nvidia drops, Tesla rises. Nasdaq gains for the week.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following a disappointing August jobs report. Nvidia's stock saw a sell-off, whereas Tesla's stock showed a significant rise. The stock market today saw the Dow sliding while the Nasdaq managed to achieve weekly gains. Notably, Nvidia broke through a key level in its stock price. Tesla's stock, on the other hand, demonstrated a strong upward movement.

data.title: Syndax Pharmaceuticals granted inducement awards for 167,400 shares to 11 new employees, options will vest over 4 years.
data.description: On September 1, 2025, Syndax Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: SNDX) revealed that they awarded 167,400 shares of common stock to 11 new employees under their 2023 Inducement Plan. These stock options will vest over four years, with 25% of the shares vesting after one year from the commencement date and the rest vesting monthly over 36 months. This is subject to the employees remaining with Syndax during the vesting period.

data.title: Trump fired the BLS commissioner after a weaker-than-expected jobs report, sparking fallout in government data credibility.
data.description: President Trump recently took decisive action in response to a disappointing jobs report by dismissing the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. This move reflects his longstanding doubts about the accuracy of government economic data. The report in question revealed a lower employment growth than anticipated, prompting the president to take action. This development highlights the tension surrounding economic data, with the government reporting a figure below expectations at that time.

data.title: July layoffs increased by 140% compared to last year. Fed inflation rate overshoots. S&P 500 sees gains.
data.description: In July, job cuts surged by 140% compared to the previous year. The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation measure exceeded expectations. Additionally, the S&P 500 index saw gains following the news.

data.title: DIAGNOS closes private placement with $100,000 raised from 10 units priced at $10,000 each. AI-based health tech company.
data.description: An AI technology company, Diagnos Inc., located in BROSSARD, Quebec, shared that it successfully completed a non-brokered private placement on September 5, 2025. The private placement involved issuing 10 units at $10,000 per unit, resulting in total gross proceeds of $100,000. Diagnos Inc. is recognized for its expertise in early health issue detection and utilizes advanced AI technology for this purpose. The company is traded on TSX Venture under the symbol ADK, OTCQB under DGNOF, and on FWB as 4D4A.

data.title: Dow Jones index dips after data release, then recovers. Alphabet and Apple surge on court ruling.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following the publication of important data. Alphabet and Apple shares saw a notable increase due to a court decision. The stock market today witnessed the Dow nearly completely recovering its losses after Federal Reserve data was released. Additionally, Warren Buffett's company's stock reversed its downward trend and rose.

data.title: Fed could cut rates after EU tariff deal, lessening inflation concerns. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The Federal Reserve could be alleviated from concerns regarding inflation caused by tariffs following President Trump's several trade agreements. This development may potentially pave the way for a possible rate cut by the Fed.

data.title: Yorkville Acquisition Corp changes ticker symbol to "MCGA" for Trump Media Group CRO Strategy, Inc. listing.
data.description: Yorkville Acquisition Corp recently revealed its decision to change its ticker symbol to "MCGA" in preparation for its listing as Trump Media Group CRO Strategy, Inc. This strategic move comes as the company gears up for its new venture, reflecting the significant upcoming developments within the organization.

data.title: Filecoin (FIL) challenges $2.50 resistance with $2.51 price, 0.64% rise in 24h, $10.2M trading volume on Binance.
data.description: The current trading price of FIL is $2.51, reflecting a 0.64% increase in the past 24 hours. This shows bullish momentum signals, although the coin is encountering resistance at the $2.50 mark. The trading volume has notably surged to $10.2 million specifically on Binance.

data.title: Dow drops before inflation survey; Gemini IPO launches. Live update on stock market. Dow Jones falls Friday.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as investors awaited an important inflation survey. Today, the Gemini IPO is scheduled to commence trading on the stock market. The stock market today reports that the Dow showed a slight decrease in anticipation of the survey results, while also highlighting the upcoming launch of the Gemini IPO.

data.title: Celestia (TIA) nears key resistance at $1.84, up 2.68% to $1.80. RSI at 55.85 hints at bullish momentum.
data.description: The price of TIA has increased by 2.68% to $1.80, nearing a significant resistance level. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 55.85, indicating possible bullish momentum despite being in neutral territory.

data.title: Polymarket teams up with Chainlink to enhance prediction market accuracy, expanding on Polygon with this new partnership.
data.description: Polymarket, a prediction platform leveraging Polygon, has announced a strategic collaboration with Chainlink, a leading decentralized oracle network. This partnership aims to enhance the infrastructure for both platforms. Notably, Polygon has a market cap of over $10 billion, while Chainlink boasts a market cap exceeding $15 billion. This move signifies a significant step in the expansion and development of decentralized prediction markets.

data.title: Cre8 Enterprise Limited wins Gold Award for interactive annual report at the 2025 ARC, notable for work on China Unicom's 2024 report; also received 2024 ARC Grand Award in Cover Design.
data.description: Hong Kong, Sept. 12, 2025 - Cre8 Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: CRE), a financial printing service provider based in Hong Kong, has won the MerComm Annual Report Competition (ARC) 2025 Interactive Annual Report Gold Award for its exceptional work on China Unicom (Hong Kong) Limited’s 2024 annual report. The Company had also previously been honored with the ARC Grand Award in Cover Design for AsiaInfo Technologies Limited’s annual report in 2024. These accolades highlight Cre8's commitment to excellence in financial printing services.

data.title: Hibbett and adidas release "State Fair" Superstar shoe limited to 1,320 pairs, inspired by Texas tradition.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, Hibbett and adidas have collaborated to release the limited-edition “State Fair” Superstar, inspired by the State Fair of Texas. Only 1,320 pairs of this unique design have been created, showcasing a playful Texas-inspired theme. The collaboration aimed to capture the essence and spirit of the State Fair through the creativity of adidas and Hibbett employees. The “State Fair” Superstar is a special edition footwear that pays homage to the flavors and vibe of Texas, offering a distinct and exclusive aesthetic.
